hero.headline:
Reliable solutions for homes
and businesses
hero.description: Whether it's a quick fix, routine maintenance, or a major project — our certified team handles it with care and craftsmanship.

featured.title: Complete Home Service Package
featured.description: One trusted partner for everything your home needs — from seasonal maintenance to repairs and upgrades. Designed for busy homeowners who want reliable results without juggling vendors.
benefits: Bundled pricing — save up to 25% vs. à la carte
Single trusted team handles everything start to finish
Transferable warranty if you sell your home

items.title: Residential Service
items.description: Trusted in-home solutions delivered by friendly, background-checked professionals.

items.title: Commercial Service
items.description: Tailored service plans for offices, retail, and small businesses across the region.

items.title: Emergency Service
items.description: 24/7 response when something can't wait. We're on the way in 60 minutes or less.

items.title: Repairs & Maintenance
items.description: Keep things running smoothly with preventative tune-ups and quick fixes.

items.title: New Installations
items.description: Expert installation of new systems and fixtures, done right the first time.

items.title: Custom Projects
items.description: Have something unique in mind? Our team scopes, plans, and delivers end-to-end.

items.title: Deep Cleaning
items.description: Top-to-bottom service for move-ins, move-outs, and seasonal refreshes.

items.title: Seasonal Tune-Up
items.description: Get ahead of breakdowns with our pre-season inspection and service package.
